examples: While a YES answer does not automatically signify ineligibility for a visa, if you answer YES you may be required to personally appear before a consular officer.
I also chose to show the ineligibility notice as its own user interface element, once again bordering on a design decision that would need to be reflected in the user interface prototype.
The second objective is to deal with the problem under the current system of ineligibility based on failure to pay into the system, i.e.
